ontology_note: Queries expanded with Disease Ontology, MONDO, and NCBI Taxonomy synonyms per ontology-first SKILL. Ambiguous abbreviations (bare RSV, TB) excluded.

HIV.query: CRISPR AND ("HIV" OR "human immunodeficiency virus" OR "Human immunodeficiency virus 1")

Hepatitis B.query: CRISPR AND ("Hepatitis B" OR "HBV" OR "Hepatitis B virus" OR "serum hepatitis")

Tuberculosis.query: CRISPR AND ("tuberculosis" OR "Mycobacterium tuberculosis" OR "Kochs disease")
Tuberculosis.note: Bare "TB" excluded (ambiguous). Old query used only abbreviated "M. tuberculosis".

SARS-CoV-2.query: CRISPR AND ("SARS-CoV-2" OR "COVID-19" OR "2019-nCoV" OR "COVID19" OR "SARS-coronavirus 2" OR "severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2")

Cholera.query: CRISPR AND ("Vibrio cholerae" OR "cholera" OR "Vibrio cholerae infection")
Cholera.note: Old query used only species name "Vibrio cholerae", missing common disease name "cholera".

MERS.query: CRISPR AND ("MERS" OR "MERS-CoV" OR "Middle East respiratory syndrome" OR "camel flu")

RSV.query: CRISPR AND ("respiratory syncytial virus" OR "Human respiratory syncytial virus" OR "HRSV")
RSV.note: Bare "RSV" excluded (ambiguous: also matches Rous sarcoma virus).

Dengue.query: CRISPR AND ("Dengue" OR "Dengue virus" OR "DENV" OR "dengue disease")

Ebola.query: CRISPR AND ("Ebola" OR "Zaire ebolavirus" OR "EHF" OR "Ebola hemorrhagic fever")

Influenza A.query: CRISPR AND ("Influenza A" OR "Influenza A virus")

Zika.query: CRISPR AND ("Zika" OR "Zika virus" OR "ZikV" OR "Zika fever")

Mpox.note: Previous count (12,025) was inflated due to operator precedence bug in original query. Corrected with explicit grouping.

AACGGTACTATTACCGTTGA.note: US20240156948A1 (Excepgen Inc.) - genome listing, not guide claim
